About

Hi, I’m Brandon Sanders — I build AI that earns its keep.

I’m an independent AI software developer and founder. For over a decade I’ve shipped web and mobile applications for enterprises and startups — and today I focus on making AI genuinely useful: apps, models, and automation that hold up in production.

When I’m not building for clients, I build my own products under Phansora — a suite of AI tools that proves this stuff works, not just in a demo.

Work with me See the work

Technologies mastered

How I work

What you can count on

Honest about AI

If a simpler tool wins, I’ll say so. I care about the outcome, not shipping AI for its own sake.

Ship, then iterate

Working software every week beats a perfect spec. You steer as it takes shape.

Production-minded

Security, cost, and maintainability from day one — not bolted on at the end.

Toolbox

A pragmatic, modern stack

PythonTypeScriptNode.jsReactPostgreSQLFastAPIPyTorchLLMs & RAGVector searchDockerAWSCI/CD

Let’s build something together

Tell me what you’re working on — I’ll tell you honestly whether AI is the right tool, and how I’d build it.

Skylanex is an independent AI software studio — we design, build, and ship intelligent applications, from custom AI apps to machine learning, NLP, and computer vision.
